issues.description: Missing 'optional' flag. Text says 'You may trash' indicating optional action.
TrashFromHand should have optional:true since effect is conditional on trashing.
GiveDon action is incomplete. Missing 'rest:true' parameter. Card text explicitly states 'rest it'.
Second effect is entirely wrong. Text does not describe a trigger condition for playing self. The 'rest it' is part of the same On Play effect, not a separate Trigger.
